context_excerpt.text: okay when you go through the problems today when we do sews when we sketch do an equation do the work write a sentence when you make your sketch i want you to be able to tell me how the numbers that we re working with relate to the sketch what part of the story problem does each number we re using represent so we re going to keep going back to the story and make sure we know what those numbers have to do with the story problem okay so if we look at this problem student r can you try and read that word problem for me

scenes.rationale: Teacher defines a subset of students by contrast to the compliant majority, framing them as not 'ready to learn math,' attributing a learning-readiness deficit based on in-the-moment behavior.
